references.text: Steenis, CGGJ van. 1949. Zygophyllaceae. Flora Malesiana series 1, 4: 64

genera.last_edited: Last edited by Pieter B. Pelser, 22 July 2023

species.citation: L. , Sp. Pl., 1st Ed. (1753) 387 ; Merr., Fl. Manila (1912) 268; Merrill, EPFP 2 (1923) 326; Steenis, Fl. Males. ser. 1, 4 (1949) 64.
species.distribution: Africa, Australia, China, Indian Ocean, Java, Lesser Sunda Isls, Madagascar, Moluccas, New Caledonia, New Guinea, Pacific Ocean, Taiwan, Vietnam. BORACAY, LUZON: La Union (photos), PALAWAN, PANAY.
species.notes: Naturalized in waste places and along the seashore and on beaches.
